misconfig_patterns: No --auth flag in default deployment — wire protocol open without credentials
bindIp 0.0.0.0 in some configs exposes MongoDB to all interfaces
$vectorSearch (Atlas Search, 7.0+) — listSearchIndexes requires auth but collection may be open

active_probe.false_positive_check: MongoDB wire handshake must return ismaster or hello document — port 27017 has very high FP risk

deployment_tells: buildInfo command returns version without auth when --auth not set
listCollections → find collections with embedding or vector in name
pivot_paths: mongo host:27017 --eval 'db.adminCommand({listDatabases:1})' → database list without auth
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
